title: SAGE-Kit Runtime Event Record v1
description: A language-neutral observable event data boundary for one future JSONL record. Schema presence does not create .sagekit, does not write runtime files, does not acquire a lock or lease, does not start a scheduler, does not recover a run, does not modify ACTIVE_CONTEXT, does not modify project history, and does not execute a Graph.

schema_id.description: Stable identity of the Runtime Event Record v1 boundary.

schema_version.description: Version of this event record data boundary.

event_id.description: Stable event identity bound to run_id and sequence by the Stage 3B generator; timestamp or random UUID alone is not sufficient.

run_id.description: Stable repository-neutral run identity. Generation is deferred to Stage 3B.

sequence.description: Positive observable event order within a run. This schema does not append or allocate it.

graph_digest.description: Stage 2B canonical graph digest. It is independent from observed timing.

event_type.description: Observable event classification only; it does not cause the named behavior.

authority_id.description: Reference to existing event authority; it does not copy, create, or upgrade authority.

actor_id.description: Observable actor identity; it grants no writer, gate, transition, or execution authority.

observed_at.description: RFC3339 observable metadata. It is not semantic graph identity, not event identity, and cannot change authority or transition legality.

reason_code.description: Bounded non-empty observable reason identifier, not free-form reasoning.

evidence_refs.description: Bounded external evidence references; no evidence table, transcript, or output is embedded.

artifact_refs.description: Bounded external artifact references; no complete command or tool output is embedded.

node_id.description: Optional Graph Contract v1 node identity for node-scoped events.

attempt_id.description: Optional attempt identity scoped by run_id and node_id. It is correlation only and does not grant repeat execution authority.

previous_status.description: Observed prior Stage 2 node status. Stage 2B pure validation remains the transition-rule owner.

next_status.description: Observed next Stage 2 node status. Stage 2B pure validation remains the transition-rule owner.

result_digest.description: Optional bounded reference to an externally defined result digest; no digest algorithm is created here.

duration_ms.description: Optional non-negative observable duration in milliseconds; it is not success evidence.
